positioning: saasonsale.com is the AI-powered engine for seasonal SaaS deals. Founders and operators discover, score, and claim the best promos for the tools they already use (or should) — turning "I spend too much" into concrete annual savings with one analysis.

drafts.draft:
Hi [Name],

I am not pitching you a big platform change. I am pressure-testing one practical workflow and I value your direct feedback.

saasonsale.com helps teams find and act on the best current seasonal deals across the tools they use (and alternatives). Stack in your current SaaS → get ranked switches with real $ savings + one-click claims. AI powered, using the same shared infra as the rest of the portfolio.

Would you be open to a 60-second walkthrough and one specific reaction on where this lands or misses (especially the analyzer + affiliate flow)?

Best,
Nir
